推荐场景: 学习伙伴聊天｜描述习惯
60秒任务: 「学习习惯」：目标/困难/建议/复盘；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 目标｜习惯｜困难｜建议｜复盘｜未来重点
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I usually study at ___.（说明习惯时间）
My routine is to ___.（说明固定流程）
I try to study a little every day.（说明频率）
It helps me remember better.（说明好处）
I often get distracted by ___.（说明干扰）
I need a quieter place to study.（提出需求）
Maybe you can set a fixed time.（提出建议）
I use a checklist to stay on track.（说明工具）
What works best for you?（询问经验）
I review old notes before I learn new things.（说明顺序）
If I’m tired, I do a shorter session.（灵活调整）
That habit sounds easy to keep.（评价习惯）
Let’s try it for one week.（试行）
I’ll record how it goes.（记录结果）
Then we can adjust the routine.（复盘调整）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: routine, habit, checklist, notes, session, quiet place, distraction
Verbs: study, remember, review, learn, record, adjust
Adjectives / Adverbs: quiet, fixed, shorter, tired
Time / Place: every day, one week, before class, after work
Chunks: study routine, fixed time, stay on track, review notes, shorter session
